title: Dreaming of Longing: The Soul's Sorrow
seoDescription: What does it mean to long or yearn in a dream? Attachment to the past, a sense of lack, hope for reunion, love, and exile.
introduction: Longing is the deep memory of the heart. To miss someone or a place in a dream whispers that your connection to the past is never severed and that something is amiss in your current life. Yearning is a measure of love and habit. Sometimes it heralds the return from exile, and at other times, it is the bitter sign of bidding farewell to that which will not return.
symbolism:
Longing envelops our hearts like the waves of a deep ocean of emotion; it builds a bridge between what we have lost and our memories. Missing a deceased loved one is like the whispered prayers echoing from the depths of our hearts. This feeling not only embodies the desire to keep their memories alive but also rejuvenates our bond with them. Each longing carries a desire for a loving remembrance, even while feeling the pain of loss.

To miss an old home or city is a journey back to the innocent days of childhood and safe memories. The desire to embrace the warm arms of the past resonates deep within our souls. To long and weep is the yearning melody of a heart desiring reunion; this melody also brings with it the loving news delivered through letters and the relief found in pouring out our hearts. Longing is not just the yearning for what we have lost; it is also an expression of our soul's desire to be reborn.
cosmicAnalysis:
This dream carries 4 different cosmic messages according to the phases of the Moon:

**🌑 New Moon:** Longing may herald new beginnings; attachment to the past serves as a seed for the blossoming of future possibilities. In this phase, you may discover your intention to embark on a new journey by making peace with what you have lost.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** The Waxing Moon is a call to action towards what you long for; it offers the opportunity to blend your past memories and bring them into the present. In this phase, you can support your inner growth by reviving old loves or memories.

**🌕 Full Moon:** The Full Moon symbolizes a time when the elements you long for come to light; it is a period to confront the depth of your ties to the past and become aware of these emotions. In this phase, expressing your feelings and accepting the lessons brought by longing becomes significant.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** The Waning Moon is a time to leave the past behind and free yourself from what you long for; in this phase, you can perform a release ritual to lighten the burdens in your heart. Take the opportunity to bid farewell to the past and make space for new beginnings.
commonScenarios: Symbolizes the end of longing, reconciliation, and peace.
Indicates the effort to communicate and the shortening of distances.
Marks loneliness and the need for roots.
